'''''124''''' group was a pair of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]] involved in supplying [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wooyou Senn]]'s [[Task Force Vengeance|Task Force ''Vengeance'']] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

During a scouting mission, a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] revealed these modified corvettes to be carrying generators and warheads. The warhead carrying vessel was then destroyed by the Rebel forces.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
